title: Status 6W LED Striplight, 284mm Warm White 3000K, 510 Lumens, S15 Cap, Pearl Cover, Energy Saving LED Tube for Kitchen, Under Cabinet, Utility and Task Lighting Replacement, (6SLSTWS15P1B6)
features: Status 6W LED striplight for efficient modern lighting Status provides a reliable LED replacement for traditional fluorescent striplights, delivering 510 lumens of bright, warm white light that is perfect for kitchens, cabinets, and utility areas.

Energy saving 6 watt LED with powerful output This 6W LED striplight consumes less energy than older fluorescent models while offering excellent brightness. It helps reduce electricity costs and is ideal for both domestic and commercial use.

284mm length with S15 cap type for easy fitting Designed for simple installation, this LED striplight fits into standard S15 fittings. Its 284mm length makes it a direct replacement for many under-cabinet and task lighting fixtures.

Warm white 3000K glow with pearl cover The 3000K warm white light creates a welcoming atmosphere while the pearl cover ensures even light distribution without glare. Perfect for enhancing workspace visibility or home ambience.

Durable and long-lasting LED technology Built for longevity, this LED striplight offers consistent performance over time, reducing the need for frequent replacements and providing a cost-effective lighting solution.
